grade_4_miss.clinical_basis: Immediate sight-threatening. Risk of irreversible blindness within months without treatment.
grade_4_miss.economic_basis: Treatment cost $60K-$160K lifetime (DRCR Protocol S). QALY loss from bilateral blindness: 0.214/yr x 30yr = 6.42 QALYs. At $50K/QALY: ~$320K societal cost. True ratio ~1,600:1; conservatively compressed to 500:1 to bias against hypothesis.

grade_3_miss.clinical_basis: 50% progress to PDR within 1 year without treatment (ETDRS).
grade_3_miss.economic_basis: Expected cost: 0.5 x Grade 4 cost, time-discounted.

grade_2_miss.economic_basis: Expected cost: 0.23 x Grade 4 cost x time discount.

grade_1_miss.clinical_basis: Low immediate risk. Annual monitoring recommended.
grade_1_miss.economic_basis: Minimal incremental cost from delayed detection.

false_positive.clinical_basis: Patient anxiety, time cost, follow-up visit.
false_positive.note: Baseline unit. All other weights are relative to this.

note: Weights are deliberately conservative. The true societal cost ratio of a missed PDR case to a false referral is closer to 1600:1 than 500:1. We compress the ratio to bias against our hypothesis.
